
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Goat|kanji=乙未|romaji=kinoto hitsuji|onyomi=otsubi|p=yǐwèi|w=i-wei|mi=i²¹ weɪ̯|y=jyut6 mei6|j=jyut6 mei6|ci=jyt̚ mei|mc=ʔit mei|oc-bs=Ɂik mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Goat also known as 乙未''' (kinoto hitsuji, otsuboku no hitsuji, itsubi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 32nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushin|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20128396}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Wood overcomes Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Goat (乙未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: itsubi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul mi (을미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Mùi

==Years of Yin Wood Goat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 35 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Goat (乙未)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|35|en|35|qid=Q3905815|lt=35|1=35}}
* {{ill|95|en|95|qid=Q1166413|lt=95|1=95}}
* {{ill|155|en|155|qid=Q30295|lt=155|1=155}}
* {{ill|215|en|215|qid=Q31648|lt=215|1=215}}
* {{ill|275|en|275|qid=Q32129|lt=275|1=275}}
* {{ill|335|en|335|qid=Q32282|lt=335|1=335}}
* {{ill|395|en|395|qid=Q48131|lt=395|1=395}}
* {{ill|455|en|455|qid=Q32507|lt=455|1=455}}
* {{ill|515|en|515|qid=Q31977|lt=515|1=515}}
* {{ill|575|en|575|qid=Q32524|lt=575|1=575}}
* {{ill|635|en|635|qid=Q31779|lt=635|1=635}}
* {{ill|695|en|695|qid=Q23484|lt=695|1=695}}
* {{ill|755|en|755|qid=Q23650|lt=755|1=755}}
* {{ill|815|en|815|qid=Q29917|lt=815|1=815}}
* {{ill|875|en|875|qid=Q23816|lt=875|1=875}}
* {{ill|935|en|935|qid=Q24867|lt=935|1=935}}
* {{ill|995|en|995|qid=Q23794|lt=995|1=995}}
|
* {{ill|1055|en|1055|qid=Q19371|lt=1055|1=1055}}
* {{ill|1115|en|1115|qid=Q19534|lt=1115|1=1115}}
* {{ill|1175|en|1175|qid=Q19692|lt=1175|1=1175}}
* {{ill|1235|en|1235|qid=Q5425|lt=1235|1=1235}}
* {{ill|1295|en|1295|qid=Q5560|lt=1295|1=1295}}
* {{ill|1355|en|1355|qid=Q6123|lt=1355|1=1355}}
* {{ill|1415|en|1415|qid=Q6183|lt=1415|1=1415}}
* {{ill|1475|en|1475|qid=Q6608|lt=1475|1=1475}}
* {{ill|1535|en|1535|qid=Q6453|lt=1535|1=1535}}
* {{ill|1595|en|1595|qid=Q6782|lt=1595|1=1595}}
* {{ill|1655|en|1655|qid=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}}
* {{ill|1715|en|1715|qid=Q6884|lt=1715|1=1715}}
* {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}}
* {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}}
* {{ill|1895|en|1895|qid=Q7844|lt=1895|1=1895}}
* {{ill|1955|en|1955|qid=Q18577|lt=1955|1=1955}}
|
* {{ill|2015|en|2015|qid=Q2002|lt=2015|1=2015}}
* {{ill|2075|en|2075|qid=Q890559|lt=2075|1=2075}}
* {{ill|2135|en|2135|qid=Q19710479|lt=2135|1=2135}}
* [[:en:2195|2195]]
* [[:en:2255|2255]]
* [[:en:2315|2315]]
* [[:en:2375|2375]]
* [[:en:2435|2435]]
* [[:en:2495|2495]]
* [[2555]]
* [[2615]]
* [[2675]]
* [[2735]]
* [[2795]]
* [[2855]]
* [[:en:2915|2915]]
* [[:en:2975|2975]]
|}
=== Events ===
* {{ill|Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|en|Assassination of Empress Myeongseong|qid=Q623757|lt=Otsemi Jihen|1=Assassination of Empress Myeongseong}} (1895)
* {{ill|Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|en|Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|qid=Q717373|lt=Otsemi Sensou|1=Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)}} (1895)

==Months of Yin Wood Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|qid=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Otsumi|ja|1=Yin Wood Goat|2=ja|乙未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Goat|qq=ja|乙未|version=88766372|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062025|af|Houtbok (astrologie)|cdo|Ĭk-ê|de|Holz-Schaf|fr|Chèvre de bois|hak|Yet-vi|ja|乙未|ko|을미|nds|Holt-Schaap|vi|Ất Mùi|za|Ietmeih|zh-min-nan|It-bī|zh-yue|乙未|zh|乙未|zh-min-nan|Kí-chhá|zh-yue|己亥|cdo|Kí-cṳ̄de|nds|Erd-Schweinevi|de|Yin Wood Goat|af|Aardevark (astrologie)|de|Erde-Schweineen|en|Earth Pig|fr|Cochon de terreboishak|it|Ki-chṳ́id|ko|기해|vi|Kỷ Hợi|za|Keiceij|zh|己亥|ar|Yin Wood Goat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
